papers_found.title: Growth and generation in SL(2,Z/pZ)
papers_found.notes: Key paper on diameter bounds for Cayley graphs of SL(2,p)

papers_found.title: Uniform expansion bounds for Cayley graphs

assessment: Helfgott (2008) and Bourgain-Gamburd (2008) establish the theoretical framework. Our computation confirms diam <= 2log(p) for all primes to 1021.
